productDisplayName: UCB Men's Polo Neck Blue T-shirt
description: CompositionBlue polo t-shirt made of 100% cotton, with a ribbed collar and tape in-seam, tipped cuffs and collar, buttoned rugged chest placket, short sleeves with ribbed hems, vented hem, appliqued seals on the sleeves and distressed look graphic lettering on the frontFittingComfortWash care Delicate machine wash at 30 degrees Use mild detergent Do not tumble dry Do not wring Do not bleach So not scrub Do not dry clean Do not dry in direct sunlight Dry flat in shade Warm iron Do not iron directly on print/embroidery Subtle and stylish, this blue polo neck t-shirt from the united colors of benetton speaks volumes of your sense of heightened style. The rugged placket on the chest coupled with the distressed look graphic and the appliqued seals on the sleeves add to the edgy look. The ribbed sleeve hems contour your well-toned arms perfectly, while the vented hem offers a comfortable Fit. Team this with jeans and lifestyle sportswear for that cool, casual look.Model statisticsThe model wears size M in t-shirtsHeight-6', Shoulders-18"
